mapper.insert:
select chat_seq.nextval from dual
insert into ai_chat values(#{chat_seq}, #{users_id}, #{title}, sysdate, sysdate)
mapper.update: update ai_chat set updated_at = sysdate where chat_seq = #{chat_seq}
mapper.insert: insert into ai_messages values(msg_seq.nextval, #{chat_seq}, #{role}, #{content}, #{ref_chunk_ids, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, sysdate, #{ref_rag_doc_seq, jdbcType=VARCHAR})
mapper.select: select chat_seq, title from ai_chat where users_id = #{loginId} order by updated_at desc
select a.role, a.content, a.ref_rag_doc_seq, q.status from ai_messages a left join ai_unanswered_questions q on a.chat_seq = q.chat_seq where a.chat_seq = #{chat_seq} order by a.msg_seq
mapper.insert: insert into ai_unanswered_questions (question_seq, users_id, category, question, dept_seq, status, created_at, chat_seq) values (question_seq.nextval, #{users_id}, #{dto.category}, #{dto.question}, #{dto.dept_seq}, 'PENDING', sysdate, #{dto.chat_seq})
mapper.select: select q.*, u.name as admin_name from ai_unanswered_questions q left join users u on q.users_handle_id = u.id where q.users_id = #{loginId} order by q.created_at
select * from ( select content from ai_messages where chat_seq = #{chat_seq} and role = 'USER' order by msg_seq desc) where rownum = 1
select role, content from ai_messages where chat_seq = #{chat_seq} order by msg_seq desc
